commands: docker run -d --name agones-palworld-e2e -p 8211:8211/udp -p 8212:8212/tcp -p 25575:25575/tcp -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e PORT=8211 -e PLAYERS=4 -e SERVER_NAME=e2e -e ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin -e RCON_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_PORT=8212 -e MULTITHREADING=true kbve/agones-palworld:latest

echo 'Waiting for Palworld REST (<=900s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 900); do if curl -fsS -u admin:e2e-admin http://127.0.0.1:8212/v1/api/info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Palworld ready after ${i}s"; break; fi; if [ -z "$(docker ps -q -f name=agones-palworld-e2e -f status=running)" ]; then echo "Container exited early at ${i}s — dumping logs:"; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -160; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; if [ $(( i % 15 )) -eq 0 ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] still waiting; container tail: ---"; docker logs --tail 5 agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /'; fi; if [ $i -eq 900 ]; then echo 'Palworld did not start in 900s — dumping logs:'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -160; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

echo 'Verifying UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded (<=120s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 120); do f=$(docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'find / -name UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null | head -1' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$f" ] && docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "grep -qi PalChatRelay '$f'" 2>/dev/null; then echo "UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded (log: $f)"; break; fi; if [ $(( i % 10 )) -eq 0 ]; then if [ -n "$f" ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] found UE4SS.log=$f tail: ---"; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "tail -4 '$f'" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  | /'; else echo "--- [${i}s] UE4SS.log not found yet ---"; fi; fi; if [ $i -eq 120 ]; then echo 'UE4SS/PalChatRelay did not load — diagnostics:'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'echo "[UE4SS.log locations]"; find / -name UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null; echo "[Mods staged]"; ls -1 /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Linux/Mods 2>/dev/null; echo "[libUE4SS.so]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Linux/libUE4SS.so 2>/dev/null; echo "[PalServer.sh exec]"; grep -n PalServer-Linux-Shipping /palworld/PalServer.sh 2>/dev/null; echo "[UE4SS.log tail]"; find / -name UE4SS.log -exec tail -n 60 {} + 2>/dev/null' || true; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -60; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

PALWORLD_HOST=127.0.0.1 PALWORLD_REST=8212 PALWORLD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin npx vitest run; EC=$?; echo '--- container logs ---'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -120; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
